list.name: Changes
list.comment: xmusiclistener.html - webapp that tattles on the other devices, listening to the music and reporting to the distributed log about what it hears.

task.summary: Default task
bach_tone_duration_extractor.json - New URLs with constant flute in PILLAR_FL
conductor_server.js - Deleted cuz we can't run it on Firebase
Moved to Older Folder
Moved to Older Folder
devicedist.html - Only do tuning mode once

devicedist.html - Uses pillar reference continuously - devices listen to lower-octave pillar notes throughout the piece
Combines both data sources in evaluation - pillars provide high-confidence anchor, neighbors provide cross-validation
Can converge faster - with pillar data, may converge in 1-2 iterations instead of 3
Falls back gracefully - if no neighbors, pillars alone can still calibrate

admin.html - Remove the placeholder tuning/current write from admin upload - the conductor will create it when starting tuning
Store pillar_notes and metadata only in tuning_mode - where they belong
The conductor reads from tuning_mode when building the tuning/current object (it already does this correctly)
Ensure wipeRealtimeData doesn't delete static configs

devicedist.html - Add return after pillar processing (already had this)
Add return after patron device processing - THIS WAS THE MISSING PIECE
Move the button disable logic to only run when there's no active schedule
devicedist.html - function initTuningListener() - Remove the Bottom Section That Sets pillarPlaybackStarted

devicedist.html - Pillars: pillarPlaybackStarted prevents re-processing schedule; tuningPlaybackStarted prevents duplicate playback from show/currentCue
Patrons: pillarPlaybackStarted is never set
devicedist.html - pillarPlaybackStarted is now set after tuning mode starts
devicedist.html - Use universal timezone for all log entries
devicedist.html - Calculate pillar freq bins from tuning data, limiting upper limit below patron device piccolo part

devicedist.html - Closest note selection - Only process the single closest pillar reference note when a detection occurs, preventing multiple notes from being triggered by the same acoustic event.
Propagation distance calculation - Compute pillar distances after mySeat is known, ensuring accurate propagation times (e.g., 16ms for B2 to PILLAR_FL).
Prevent infinite loop - Check if piece already ended before starting new iterations, and remove the playTuningMovement() call from the retry branch so playback doesn't restart.

devicedist.html - Phase 1 mic delay now subtracts pillar speaker delay and propagation from raw delay
Pillar reference detection now subtracts pillar speaker delay from raw delay to get patron speaker delay
Neighbor measurements now account for pillar mic delay when reporting to pillars
No negative clamping - we accept the actual calculated values which should now be positive (0-200ms)
Removed the evaluateIteration() clamping since the values should now be correct
bach_tone_duration_extractor.json - New louder PILLAR_FL MP3
devicedist.html - Set default speaker delay to 261 ms and default mic delay to 13 ms, like Google Pixel 6
devicedist.html - REALLY Set default speaker delay to 261 ms and set default mic delay to 6 ms, like Google Pixel 6
devicedist.html - initTuningListener function with the fix to prevent duplicate tuning playback
conductor.html - Show active pillars as green in GUI
devicedist.html - function handleMovementStart with logging to verify speaker delay is being applied

reset_pillar.html - Part of the SmartphoneOrchestra
Helps sound tech calibrate the four Samsung A9 Tablets forming the pillars at each corner of the house.

reset_pillar.html - Test tone buttons are generated immediately using default pillar data if Firebase config isn't loaded yet
getDefaultPillarData() provides fallback positions and frequencies so the UI renders instantly
The buttons are always visible and enabled from page load—no dependency on all pillars being online
The buttons work on the device they're running on—each pillar can trigger its own test tone, but the buttons for other pillars are also visible (they just won't produce sound because the tone is synthesized locally, not sent over the network)
reset_pillar.html - Update to match data structure in pillar_config.json (which is uploaded to Firebase by admin.html)
reset_pillar.html - Use those MP3 URLS
reset_pillar.html - Balance tone buttons Always enabled. Clock synchronization. Initialize solver with existing values from pillar_config.json (45ms speaker, 18ms mic).
reset_pillar.html - function loadPillarConfig - simplified version that ensures the UI renders immediately
devicedist.html - function reportMeasurement - Only add pillar-specific fields if the playing device is actually a pillar
conductor.html - set MAX_LOG_ENTRIES = 1000
devicedist.html - source.loop = false; to finally stop the apparent re-start of the tuning movement
devicedist.html - The COPY LOGS button now copies MAX_LOG_ENTRIES not just 500
devicedist.html - The COPY LOGS button now copies MAX_LOG_ENTRIES not just 500. Add logging.
devicedist.html - More debugging log entries.

conductor.html - UTC logging (all timestamps use .toISOString().substr(11, 12))
Removed hardcoded default pillar URLs - now loads from tuning_mode.json
Clears stale tuning schedule before each start
Proper pillar URL loading from tuning_mode.json assets
xlisten.html - debugging tool for listening to the conversation between conductor.html and devicedist.html about note timing

devicedist.html - Immediate Note Scheduling: Added a block that calls schedulePhase2Notes right after the schedule is loaded, before Phase 1 windows are set up. This ensures notes are queued to play at their correct times, regardless of calibration status.
Pillar Playback Timing: Corrected the pillar's start delay calculation to use only speaker delay: schedule.startTime - nowWall - calibratedSpeakerDelay.
Disabled Blocking Calibration: The call to startIterativeCalibration() is commented out. This function was designed to run sequentially and blocked note playback. The real-time calibration via pillar/neighbor reports will run concurrently.
Fallback Scheduling: Added a fallback in the Phase 1 completion timeout to schedule notes if they weren't already scheduled (e.g., if pillarWindows was empty).
xlisten.html - Enable download button immediately.
devicedist.html - Use default speaker delay until neighbors can help recalibrate it
devicedist.html - Pre-load pillar timing music to prevent startup delays later
devicedist.html - Removed mic delay from playback calculation
devicedist.html - Try again to preload pillar tuning MP3
devicedist.html - Change the timing calc to include speaker delay (again)
xplay and xrecord - test programs to see if mic can hear pillar music
devicedist.html - function initTuningListener now corrected pillar playback logic (tuningPlaybackStarted set only after actual playback starts) and patron device handling
devicedist.html - large mods for pitch-aware note detection
devicedist.html - //REDUCE LOG CLUTTER

devicedist.html - schedulePhase2Notes() - Use estimatedDeviceDelayMs (261ms) as default. processDetectionWindows() - Use wide window (500ms) initially, then narrow with calibrated player delays. getPlayerSpeakerDelay() - Add function to lookup player's delay (pillar=45ms, calibrated patrons, default=261ms).
devicedist.html - Phase 1 ends normally at 20.6 seconds, but we have a fallback at 25 seconds. The fallback was erroneously set at GO+25 s, now set at GO+buffer+25 s.
xmusiclistener.html - webapp that tattles on the other devices, listening to the music and reporting to the distributed log about what it hears.

MESSAGE.value: reset_pillar.html - Use those MP3 URLS
reset_pillar.html - Balance tone buttons Always enabled. Clock synchronization. Initialize solver with existing values from pillar_config.json (45ms speaker, 18ms mic).
reset_pillar.html - function loadPillarConfig - simplified version that ensures the UI renders immediately
devicedist.html - function reportMeasurement - Only add pillar-specific fields if the playing device is actually a pillar
conductor.html - set MAX_LOG_ENTRIES = 1000
devicedist.html - source.loop = false; to finally stop the apparent re-start of the tuning movement
devicedist.html - The COPY LOGS button now copies MAX_LOG_ENTRIES not just 500
devicedist.html - The COPY LOGS button now copies MAX_LOG_ENTRIES not just 500. Add logging.
devicedist.html - More debugging log entries.

conductor.html - UTC logging (all timestamps use .toISOString().substr(11, 12))
Removed hardcoded default pillar URLs - now loads from tuning_mode.json
Clears stale tuning schedule before each start
Proper pillar URL loading from tuning_mode.json assets
xlisten.html - debugging tool for listening to the conversation between conductor.html and devicedist.html about note timing

devicedist.html - Immediate Note Scheduling: Added a block that calls schedulePhase2Notes right after the schedule is loaded, before Phase 1 windows are set up. This ensures notes are queued to play at their correct times, regardless of calibration status.
Pillar Playback Timing: Corrected the pillar's start delay calculation to use only speaker delay: schedule.startTime - nowWall - calibratedSpeakerDelay.
Disabled Blocking Calibration: The call to startIterativeCalibration() is commented out. This function was designed to run sequentially and blocked note playback. The real-time calibration via pillar/neighbor reports will run concurrently.
Fallback Scheduling: Added a fallback in the Phase 1 completion timeout to schedule notes if they weren't already scheduled (e.g., if pillarWindows was empty).
xlisten.html - Enable download button immediately.
devicedist.html - Use default speaker delay until neighbors can help recalibrate it
devicedist.html - Pre-load pillar timing music to prevent startup delays later
devicedist.html - Removed mic delay from playback calculation
devicedist.html - Try again to preload pillar tuning MP3
devicedist.html - Change the timing calc to include speaker delay (again)
xplay and xrecord - test programs to see if mic can hear pillar music
devicedist.html - function initTuningListener now corrected pillar playback logic (tuningPlaybackStarted set only after actual playback starts) and patron device handling
devicedist.html - large mods for pitch-aware note detection
devicedist.html - //REDUCE LOG CLUTTER

devicedist.html - schedulePhase2Notes() - Use estimatedDeviceDelayMs (261ms) as default. processDetectionWindows() - Use wide window (500ms) initially, then narrow with calibrated player delays. getPlayerSpeakerDelay() - Add function to lookup player's delay (pillar=45ms, calibrated patrons, default=261ms).
devicedist.html - Phase 1 ends normally at 20.6 seconds, but we have a fallback at 25 seconds. The fallback was erroneously set at GO+25 s, now set at GO+buffer+25 s.
xmusiclistener.html - webapp that tattles on the other devices, listening to the music and reporting to the distributed log about what it hears.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: xmusiclistener.html - webapp that tattles on the other devices, listening to the music and reporting to the distributed log about what it hears.
